title: MikroTik QSFP28 optical module XQ+85MP01D, MM, 100m, 100G
description: XQ+85MP01D is a Multimode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100 Gbps, 4 channels of 25 Gbps, one 12-fiber MPO connector for connection up to a distance of 100 m . The module is compatible with all active elements from MikroTik and also with devices of other manufacturers "cisco compatibile" with a QSFP28 port The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including optical power monitoring and will work well in environments up to 70 °C. The module has been designed to meet the harshest conditions including temperature and will act as a reliable solution for all your devices with QSFP28 ports with speed of 100 Gbps
